shared_properties: Icons use a consistent 40x40 px grid with bold outer shapes that stay legible above the enemy caster.
Core palette metadata remains primary #5C3317, background #2B1B17, and accent #D4AF37 while elemental icon colors appear inside specs.colors_hex.
The sheet is authored for transparent background compositing and quick atlas lookup.
differences: The atlas includes forecast icons for fire, water, thunder, wind, ice, poison, light, and dark spells.
Each icon uses one dominant elemental silhouette so players can recognize the upcoming spell during the short pre-launch warning beat.
A thin shared ring language keeps the set cohesive while allowing each center glyph to remain unique.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the duel loop, projectile attributes, UI layout, and Bevy runtime constraints for Reflect Academy.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the warm academy hall mood, layered duel composition, and luminous spell contrast.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load spell_forecast_icon_sheet.png during Loading and build a 4x2 atlas for enemy forecast UI widgets.
runtime_notes: Anchor the forecast icon slightly above the enemy caster head with UI or world-space screen-facing placement.
Swap atlas index based on elemental state without recoloring the icon at runtime.
Keep a dark outline or backing ring on each icon so pale symbols remain readable against window glow.

context.usage: Short-warning elemental icon UI shown above the enemy before projectile launch.

icon_notes: Dark uses a crescent void silhouette.

acceptance_criteria: Atlas canvas is exactly 160x80 px for eight 40x40 frames with no frame gutter.
Each icon remains recognizable at 24x24 px preview size.
No two elemental icons share the same primary silhouette.
